t: TPR Valve Missing or No Drain
why: Scalding + explosion risk. Must terminate 6in above floor.
fix: Install TPR valve + copper/CPVC drain to 6in above floor drain.
rep: TPR drain missing per IMC 504.6. Install proper discharge.

t: Dryer Vent Over 25ft / No Rigid Metal
fix: Use rigid metal. Reroute to <25ft. Add booster if needed.
rep: Dryer duct exceeds max length. Replace with rigid metal.
Verify combustion air per IMC 701.4.1. Add openings.

t: Condensate Drain No Trap / No Float Switch
why: Water damage + mold. Attic units must have aux pan.
fix: Add P-trap, vent, and float switch in aux pan.
rep: Condensate drain missing trap/float. Add per IMC 307.2.3.

why: Energy loss. Must be sealed with mastic/UL181.
fix: Seal all joints with mastic. Test to <4% leakage.
rep: Duct leakage exceeds IECC C403.2.9. Seal with mastic.
